positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical forest scene, featuring large, abstract, bioluminescent mushrooms and winding, silhouetted tree roots. The style is clean line art combined with watercolor texture, giving a soft, ethereal glow (glowing cyan and deep indigo accents on a warm cream background). Central composition, perfect for repeating pattern or a single chest print. Focus on strong negative space and clean, vector-like edges. Hyper-detailed but aesthetically simple. Flat graphic design principles, high contrast, perfect for textile printing.
